overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a detailed gothic castle interior. The character walks through corridors lined with animated portraits, ascends a stone staircase through a foggy upper level, and enters a grand library with towering bookshelves. The environment features warm candlelight, historic stone architecture, and atmospheric mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic castle corridor with animated portraits

events.description: character stops walking to observe a portrait on the wall, interaction prompt appears

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the corridor, pausing briefly to look at a portrait, then continuing forward

entered.detail: ornate carved stone railing lining the corridor edge
gilded frames containing animated portraits hanging on stone walls
medieval-style wall-mounted lanterns providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow gothic corridor with stone balustrades and walls covered in animated portraits. Warm light from wall sconces illuminates the path. The character pauses briefly around the 12-second mark to observe a specific portrait before continuing forward.

events.description: character begins ascending the stone staircase

agents.ego_description: walking along the corridor and climbing the stone stairs to the upper level

entered.detail: wide stone steps with carved railings leading upward
gothic stone arch at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the corridor into a stairwell, approaching and then climbing a wide stone staircase. The stone archway at the top becomes visible as the character ascends toward the upper level of the castle.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty upper corridor with large wooden doors

events.description: character opens large wooden doors and enters the library

agents.ego_description: walking through the foggy upper corridor toward the large wooden doors at the end

entered.detail: massive stone pillars supporting the corridor ceiling
ornate hanging light fixture visible through the fog
tall double doors with metal studs leading to the library

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a misty upper corridor with low visibility. Stone columns line the path, and a chandelier hangs in the distance. The segment ends as the character reaches and opens the large wooden doors to enter the library.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand library with towering bookshelves and reading tables

agents.ego_description: walking through the library, observing the bookshelves and reading areas

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling wooden bookshelves filled with books
wooden tables with chairs for studying
classic green-shaded lamps on the reading tables
wrought iron spiral staircase leading to upper gallery
tall fluted wooden pillars supporting the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character enters a vast library with towering bookshelves, reading tables with green bankers' lamps, and a spiral staircase. The space is wide and open compared to the narrow corridors, with wooden columns and a patterned carpet runner along the floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow, candlelit gothic corridor that gradually opens into a vast, scholarly library. It begins by tracing the character's path along stone balustrades and animated portraits, pausing briefly at one painting before moving forward. As the corridor ends, the camera follows the character through a stone archway and up a wide staircase toward the castle's upper level. The scene then shifts into a misty corridor where visibility drops among stone columns and a distant chandelier, leading directly to a set of large wooden doors. Finally, the space expands dramatically as the doors open to reveal a grand library filled with towering bookshelves, green bankers' lamps, and a spiral staircase.
